entity.summary: Godwoken V1 automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with residual protocol liquidity and substantial historical trading volume but no recent fee activity in the reviewed registry snapshot.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Hadouken AMM as a Godwoken V1 decentralized exchange and reports residual TVL and substantial cumulative DEX volume, while 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour fee activity is zero in the reviewed snapshot. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead status. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Hadouken Finance project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Hadouken AMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Hadouken AMM as a Godwoken V1 AMM DEX and reports residual TVL, substantial cumulative DEX volume, and zero recent fee activity, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: Hadouken AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Hadouken AMM as a Godwoken V1 decentralized exchange.
